South Utsire.text:
Wind
In north, easterly or northeasterly becoming cyclonic, 3 to 5. In south, easterly 5 to 7 backing northeasterly 4 to 6.
Sea state
In north, slight or moderate. in south, moderate or rough.
Weather
In north, fair, then snow showers. In south, rain or wintry showers.
Visibility
In north, good, occasionally very poor. In south, moderate or good, occasionally poor. Light icing developing near norway.
